free_text: Average cross sections for the Cf-252 neutron spectrum
Average U-238,Pa-231 and Th-232(n,f) cross sections
Average Th, U and Np(n,f) cross sections
Data for half-life, gamma energy and intensity
Natural samples of about 1 mm thickness and 10 mm
diameter, in a cadmium box of 1 mm
spontaneous fission neutron spectrum of Cf-252 were
by activation method in scattering free arrangement.
Ge(Li) detector connected to a DIDAC-4000
The efficiency-curve was measured with Ra-226 standard
of the same dimension as the sample.
The author presents also the averaged cross-sections
for the Cf-252 neutron spectrum to the Proc. of an
educational seminar by IAEA, Karlsruhe,14-18 April
1975. However the values of Au-197(n,2n), Al-27(n,p),
Au-197(n,g) and In-115 (n,n') are different from
those in the Ann.Nucl.Energy 3(1976)527. This is
Old data were reinvestigated using more advanced
technique. Therefore the author recommends to
supersede the data in the seminar held in Karlsruhe,
KO. Change of BIB-section, amendments of
subents 002-012, addition of new subents 013-043, and
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
OS. Subentry 2 deleted because no relevant data given.
Coding of DECAY-DATA improved in many subentries.
